title: Import my IP addresses from SYS to OVHcloud
step1Description: To proceed with the import of an IP, you need to know the key (token) generated by the server manager that is currently associated with the IP you wish to migrate.
step2CompatibilitySuccessMessage: The server {{ serverName }} is compatible with {{ ip }}
step2UnavailableMigrationMessage: The server {{ serverName }} is not compatible with the import of the IP address {{ ip }}. Please contact support for more information.
step5ConfirmTextPart1: Click the "{{ confirmButtonLabel }}" button to confirm your order.
step5ConfirmTextPart2: A new tab will open and you will be automatically redirected to the payment interface.
step5SuccessMessage: The migration request (order {{ orderId }}) has been successfully received.
